title: BeadRecord
description: Schema for a single entry in the bead data lake.

finish.description: Surface finish, e.g. glossy, matte, transparent, metallic

shape.description: Bead shape, e.g. round, faceted, tube, flat, bicone

focal_bead.description: True if this bead is a focal bead (the central design element of a piece)

is_3d.description: True if the focal bead is a 3D figurine; false if it is a flat bead (~5–6 mm thick) with a character printed/moulded on both faces

focal_description.description: Description specific to this focal bead; rare but not unique across beads

embeddings.description: ResNet-50 feature vectors (2048-dim, L2-normalised), one per reference image
